raw_consumer_statement: I paid my GM Credit Card, issued by Barclays, in the full amount of the statement ehich was {$3600.00}. I pay my card in full every month. My payment was an electronic payment from my checking account through XXXX. Barclays say they have never received it. XXXX has verified through a Proof of Payment document that it was paid and provided to me with the XXXXransaction ID and Trace Number. The information and supporting documents have been provided to Barclays mutiple times. I have contacted Barclays by phone no less than XXXX times to resolve. I have talked talked to the same person and have to tell the customer service representative each time what took place. The payment I sent to Barclays on XXXX was to Barclays, but had my XXXX XXXX XXXX ( previous GM card provider ) account number. XXXX XXXX XXXX transfered all GM Card related transactions to Barclays on XXXX. I have sent XXXX letters to Barclays XXXX XXXX XXXX and have received a return call XXXX time. To this date, this issue has not been resolced and Barclays still has my {$3600.00}. Every time I contact Barclays they say they connot find the payment even though XXXX verfies the payment was sent to Barclays. I would like Barclays to return my {$3600.00}.
